workflows.name: Find and Select a Project
workflows.description: Discover which projects exist and pick the correct one for a task.
success_criteria: Plan uses at most 3 tool calls.
If project name is ambiguous, ask a clarifying question.
Planned tool names exist in MCP tools/list.

prompt_variants.prompt: What Stellarbridge projects do I have access to?
Show me all available Drive projects and their ids.
List my projects so I can pick the right one.

workflows.name: Browse Project Root
workflows.description: List the top-level files and folders in a project.
success_criteria: Ask for project_id if not provided.
Plan includes a Drive listing call for project root.

prompt_variants.prompt: List the files and folders at the root of my Contracts project.
Show me what's in the root of project_id 1.
Open the Stellarbridge Drive project root (not the local repo) and show me its contents.

workflows.name: Browse a Folder
workflows.description: List the contents of a specific Drive folder.
success_criteria: Ask for folder object_id (and project_id if needed).
Plan includes a folder listing using parent_id.

prompt_variants.prompt: Show me what's inside folder object_id 28 in my Drive.
List the contents of my Invoices folder (I have the folder id).
List the children of this folder id and label which are files vs folders.

workflows.name: Create a Folder
workflows.description: Create a new folder in a project root or inside another folder.
success_criteria: Ask for project_id and folder name.
If parent folder is unknown, ask where to create it.
Plan uses at most one folder creation call (or ask what to create first).

prompt_variants.prompt: Create a folder called 'Invoices' in the root of project_id 1.
Make a new folder named '2026-04' under my Invoices folder.
Add a folder for monthly invoices in the right Drive location.

workflows.name: Upload a File to Drive
workflows.description: Plan the steps to upload a local file into a Drive folder.
success_criteria: Ask for local file path and target project/folder.
Plan includes creating a file placeholder and uploading bytes (or a single upload-by-path tool if available).
Do not execute tool calls; return plan only.

prompt_variants.prompt: Upload /path/to/invoice.pdf into my Invoices folder in the Invoices project.
I have a PDF on disk. Plan how to upload it into a specific Drive folder.
Put this invoice PDF into the correct project and month folder.

workflows.name: Download a File from Drive
workflows.description: Plan how to obtain a download URL for a Drive file and download it.
success_criteria: Ask for the file object_id (or how to locate it).
Plan includes requesting a download URL.

prompt_variants.prompt: Get me a download link for Drive file object_id 88.
I need to download a file from Drive. I have the object id.
Generate a URL I can use to download the file from Stellarbridge Drive.

workflows.name: Share a Drive File by Email
workflows.description: Plan how to share a Drive file with an external recipient by email.
success_criteria: Ask for object_id and recipient email.

prompt_variants.prompt: Share Drive file object_id 88 with alice@example.com.
I need to email a Drive share link for a specific file.
Send this Drive file to an external partner by email (planning only).

workflows.name: Rename a File or Folder
workflows.description: Plan a rename to match a naming convention.
success_criteria: Optionally fetch metadata first if needed to confirm the target.

prompt_variants.prompt: Rename Drive object_id 35 to 'invoice-2026-04-acme.pdf'.
I need to rename a file in Drive. I know the object id and the new name.
Update the name of this Drive item to match our compliance naming rules.

workflows.name: Move a File or Folder
workflows.description: Plan how to move a Drive object to a different folder or to project root.
success_criteria: Ask for object_id and destination folder id (or confirm moving to root).

prompt_variants.prompt: Move Drive object_id 35 into folder object_id 28.
Move this Drive item back to the project root.
Reorganize Drive by moving a file into a different folder (planning only).

workflows.name: Delete a File or Folder
workflows.description: Plan how to delete a Drive object.
success_criteria: Ask for object_id and confirm deletion intent.

prompt_variants.prompt: Delete Drive object_id 99 (I confirm it is disposable).
Remove this file from Drive. I have the object id.
Delete an unnecessary folder from the project (planning only).

workflows.name: Inspect a Drive Object
workflows.description: Fetch metadata for a Drive object to confirm name/type/parent.

prompt_variants.prompt: Get metadata for Drive object_id 28.
Tell me what this Drive object is (file vs folder) and its name.
I have an object id; I need details about it.

workflows.name: Review Policy Attachments
workflows.description: List the access policy attachments on a Drive file/folder.

prompt_variants.prompt: List policy attachments for Drive object_id 28.
What access policies are attached to this folder?
Show me the policy attachments on a specific Drive object.

workflows.name: Attach a Policy to an Object
workflows.description: Plan how to attach an access policy to a Drive object.
success_criteria: Plan includes a policy attach action.

prompt_variants.prompt: Attach policy_id 9 to Drive object_id 28.
Apply an access policy to this folder so downloads are restricted (planning only).
I want to apply a policy to a Drive item; I know the policy id and object id.

workflows.name: Detach a Policy Attachment
workflows.description: Plan how to remove a specific policy attachment from a Drive object.

prompt_variants.prompt: Remove policy attachment att-2 from Drive object_id 28.
Detach a policy from this Drive folder (I have the attachment id).
Undo an access policy attachment on a Drive object (planning only).

workflows.name: List Recent Transfers
workflows.description: Find recent transfers (uploads) and identify a transfer id for follow-up actions.
success_criteria: If org filtering matters, ask for org id.

prompt_variants.prompt: List my recent transfers.
Show transfers for my organization so I can pick one.
Find the latest transfer id I can use for sharing.

workflows.name: Inspect a Transfer
workflows.description: Look up transfer metadata by transfer id.

prompt_variants.prompt: Get details for transfer_id tid-1.
I have a transfer id; show me its size and status (planning only).
Look up transfer metadata for a specific transfer.

workflows.name: Share a Transfer by Email
workflows.description: Plan how to share a transfer download with a recipient by email.
success_criteria: Ask for transfer_id and recipient email.
Plan includes a transfer share action.

prompt_variants.prompt: Email transfer tid-3 to bob@example.com.
Share a transfer download link with a recipient (planning only).
Send this transfer to an external party by email.

workflows.name: Add a Transfer into Drive
workflows.description: Plan how to place a completed transfer into a Drive project/folder.
success_criteria: Ask for transfer_id and destination project_id (and optional parent folder id).
Plan includes adding transfer into Drive.

prompt_variants.prompt: Add transfer tid-4 into project_id 1 in the Drive root.
Move a completed transfer into the Contracts project folder (planning only).
Take this transfer and place it into a Drive folder so it shows up in Drive.

workflows.name: Request a File Upload from an External User
workflows.description: Create a file upload request and send it to a recipient by email.
success_criteria: Ask for recipient_email and request title; optional message and expiry.
Plan includes creating an upload request.

prompt_variants.prompt: Send a file upload request to vendor@example.com for 'April invoice'.
Create an upload request link for an external contractor to submit a document.
Ask someone outside the org to upload a file to Stellarbridge (planning only).

workflows.name: Investigate Using Audit Logs
workflows.description: Search audit logs for security/compliance reporting (time range, actor, or file).
success_criteria: Plan includes an audit log query.
Ask for time range and filters (actor id, file name, file hash) if needed.

prompt_variants.prompt: Show me audit logs for the last 24 hours.
Find audit events for actor user@example.com (I can provide actor id if required).
Show audit logs related to file name 'invoice.pdf' over the last week.

tool_prompts.prompt: List all projects I can access.
Create a new project named 'M&A Diligence' with partner ids 1,2.
Delete project_id 123 (it is empty).
List the Drive objects in project_id 1 (root unless a folder id is provided).
Get metadata for Drive object_id 28.
Create a folder named 'Invoices' in project_id 1 under parent folder 28.
Create a file placeholder 'invoice.pdf' (mime type application/pdf) in project_id 1 under parent folder 28.
Rename Drive object_id 35 to 'invoice-2026-04-acme.pdf'.
Move Drive object_id 35 into folder object_id 28.
Delete Drive object_id 99 (disposable).
Get an upload URL for file placeholder object_id 62.
Complete the Drive upload for object_id 62 with bucket=<BUCKET>, etag=<ETAG>, and size_bytes=<SIZE_BYTES>.
Upload the local file at /path/to/file.bin to Drive file placeholder object_id 62.
Get a download URL for Drive file object_id 88.
Share Drive file object_id 88 with recipient alice@example.com.
List policy attachments for Drive object_id 28.
Attach policy_id 9 to Drive object_id 28.
Detach attachment_id att-2 from Drive object_id 28.
List transfers (optionally filtered by org_id if I provide it).
Get transfer metadata for transfer_id tid-1.
Delete transfer_id tid-2 (disposable).
Share transfer_id tid-3 with recipient bob@example.com.
Add transfer_id tid-4 into Drive project_id 1 (optionally under parent folder 28).
Get public download info for transfer_id pub-1.
Initialize a multipart upload for file 'big.bin' with size_bytes 10485760.
Get multipart presigned URLs for upload_id up-1 and file_key key-1 for 2 parts.
Finalize multipart upload with upload_id=<UPLOAD_ID>, file_key=<FILE_KEY>, size_bytes=<SIZE_BYTES>, and parts=<PARTS>. (parts is the list of uploaded parts, e.g. [{"PartNumber":1,"ETag":"..."}])
Cancel multipart upload for upload_id up-1 and file_key key-1.
Upload a local file /path/to/big.bin as a new transfer via multipart upload.
Create a file upload request titled 'April invoice' for recipient vendor@example.com with an optional message.
Check the status/details for file request id req-1.
Delete/cancel the file request id req-1.
Fetch audit logs for the last 24 hours (limit 50).
Fetch audit logs for actor_id 12345 for the last 24 hours.
Fetch audit logs related to file name 'invoice.pdf' for the last 7 days.
